comment: Airwindows PurestDrive port. Adaptive sin-based saturation. First real Airwindows port — exercises .fardata state and inline sinf approximation.
_audio_func_comment: matches the symbol name in purestdrive.c
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter. MS-70CDR has no Drive (0x03) category. Filter places it next to A-Filter and friends, fine for now.
fxid_comment: 0x0191 — one above GAIN to keep them adjacent in the menu.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: params[5]. Audible saturation amount, 0..100. Scaled 8x in the audio function (matches the empirical scaling we tuned for GAIN).

params.name: Mix
params.comment: params[6]. UI placeholder for now — second knob is required because firmware does not support nknobs=1. Real wet/dry blend can come later.
